productDisplayName: Latin Quarters Women Purple & White Top
description: Style Note This super soft purple top with a pretty satin tie up, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this cute top. Style this with your favourite jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. Product Details Purple and white tube top with a keyhole opening on the front, a satin tie-up woven through the keyhole and elasticated at the back and hem Material and Care 100% viscose Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Line dry Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
